headline: JPMorgan Lifts Eversource (ES) Price Target Following Model Updates
summary: Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) is included among the 14 Quality Stocks with Highest Dividends. On March 12, JPMorgan raised its price recommendation on Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) to $75 from $72. The firm reiterated an Underweight rating on the shares. The update followed changes to its models for the North American utilities group. During the Q4 2025 […]
